response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack experience across TypeScript, Node.js, React, and cloud tools like AWS CDK and Docker, with clear exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and testing frameworks — aligning well with the core stack and responsibilities. His open-source contributions and architecture-level work demonstrate depth, though the lack of explicit Nest.js or Vitest experience and limited mention of Kotlin/Java are minor gaps.
strengths: Extensive full-stack experience with TypeScript, Node.js, and React across enterprise-scale applications
Proven expertise in AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling, including MCP frameworks
Strong DevOps and infrastructure skills with Docker, Kubernetes, CI/CD, and GitLab
concerns: No explicit mention of Nest.js or Vitest — key required technologies in the job description
Kotlin/Java experience is implied but not clearly demonstrated in recent roles
German language proficiency is basic, which may hinder collaboration in a Germany-based team
